Changed.msg: Row Filter feature renamed to Top Rows to better reflect what it does.

Added.msg: Lots of extra properties for customizing heatmaps.

Removed.msg: Separate cluster button on MatCalc toolbar. Now the heatmap button does both heatmaps and clustergrams.

General purpose gene set storage in MatCalc UI.

Bottombar no longer triggers stack overflow
AppInfo now a provider rather than a store
Refined theme manager to work with next and added inline script to set theme
Tabs scoped to apps. More UI controlled through tabs context rather than passing by props
Added support for tabs to take component refs and render on the fly
heatmap panel now uses resizable sidebar to get rid of heatmapcontext error using tabs
Add more usecallbacks in contexts to stabilize functions

Changed.msg: Sankey can now create plots from sheet. Matcalc file tree simplified. Fonts now support rotation
Sankey now uses sliders in UI
Resizable sidebar now uses slot system similar to footer to allow placement of components in header. This seems more robust than the portal method
Added clear genesets and groups feature

Added.msg: Sankey dialog now allows for col selection

Changed.msg: Now correctly checks for GSEA plot line endpoints finish at y0 and adds additional points if they do not
Removal of more toasts. Side tab UI updated.
GSEA plot renderer split to make more managable. UI tweaks
Revised colorpicker api to use more optional params

Fixed Variants UI and added more Fill and Outline UI elements
IOS slider UI simplified. More use of sliders. GSEA plot using more debounce to keep UI response when showing a lot of plots.

Added.msg: Added ios toggles with animation
Added new card layout for dialogs which looks nicer than the settings accordion.

Motif to gene now works without selecting a column beforehand.
UI refinments. Table viewer cleaned up
